name: Minestrone Soup (Delux)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onions.
2. Cube the carrots.
3. Dice the celery stalks.
4. Clean, split, and chop the white portion of the leeks.
5. Wash and cut the zucchinis into bite-sized cubes.
6. Pre-cook the macaroni.
7. Place a large (12 quart) pan on high heat.
8. When hot, add the olive oil, then the diced onion and garlic.
9. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about ten minutes.
10. Add the celery, leeks, and all the dry seasonings except for the paprika.
11. Stirring regularly, cook until the onions are clear and the celery is softening.
12. Add the carrots, vegetable broth, and water.
13. Crush the tomatoes before adding them.
14. Stir well, then add the paprika.
15. Bring the mixture to a boil, then lower the heat to a good simmer.
16. Add the cabbage and zucchini; stir well and cover.
17. Cook for about five hours or more, stirring occasionally.
18. Just before serving, add the cooked macaroni and adjust seasoning if needed.
